title: jurinea peguensis
intro: Jurinea peguensis, also known as Jurinea, is a plant species belonging to the asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jurinea peguensis include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Jurinea peguensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
